name: md-compose-tb
description: Compose Thunderbird messages in Markdown and send them as HTML.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.test: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
scripts.xpi: pnpm run build && rm -rf artifacts && mkdir -p artifacts && cd dist && zip -r -X ../artifacts/md-compose-tb.xpi .
